results.title: Is your child's toy safe? Health Canada issues 9 product recall notices for items sold on Amazon
results.description: Health Canada has issued recall notices for nine TheKiddoSpace children's products sold on Amazon Canada due to choking, burn and lead hazards.

results.title: Opinion: The farm bill passed the House. Western New Hampshire got the bill.
results.description: The 2026 Farm Bill has been passed, increasing subsidies for large commodity operations while neglecting the needs of local farmers, resulting in rising input costs and farm bankruptcies.

results.title: Outdoor bar plan dropped by York pub
results.description: A York pub has dropped its bid for an outdoor bar.

results.title: PennDOT scheduled maintenance work for June 1-5
results.description: Pennsylvania Dept. of Transportation (PennDOT) District 10 has released the scheduled maintenance work scheduled in Armstrong County for the week of June 1-5.

results.title: Seton Hill gets DCED funding to aid small businesses in eight area counties
results.description: A $1.136 million grant from the Pennsylvania Department of Community & Economic Development is being utilized by Seton Hill University to provide microgrants for small businesses in eight southwest and west-central Pennsylvania counties, including Indiana.

results.title: My First $1 Million: Retired Navy Officer, 63, Greenville, S.C.
results.description: "We are enjoying the fruits of our labor, but feel like it was not as difficult as we'd thought. It just takes time and focus. We started out with very little."
